name: stallari-blade-mcp
title: Stallari Vault
description: Obsidian vault operations via Swift MCP — read, write, search, properties, graph analysis, lens semantic tools
author: groupthink-dev

tools.name: vault_info
tools.description: Vault metadata: path, note count, folder count.

tools.name: vault_help
tools.description: Quick-reference help for vault tools, optionally filtered by topic.

tools.name: vault_read
tools.description: Read full content of a note (resolved via file= wikilink or path=).

tools.name: vault_create
tools.description: Create a new note in the vault.

tools.name: vault_append
tools.description: Append content to an existing note.

tools.name: vault_prepend
tools.description: Prepend content to an existing note (after frontmatter).

tools.name: vault_patch
tools.description: Replace exact text span in a note body. Destructive within reversible-trash model.

tools.name: vault_files
tools.description: List files in the vault with optional folder/extension filter and sort order.

tools.name: vault_file_info
tools.description: Get metadata for a single file (size, timestamps, frontmatter summary).

tools.name: vault_folders
tools.description: List all folders in the vault.

tools.name: vault_recents
tools.description: List recently modified files, newest first.

tools.name: vault_property_read
tools.description: Read a single frontmatter property value.

tools.name: vault_property_set
tools.description: Set a frontmatter property (atomic).

tools.name: vault_property_remove
tools.description: Remove a frontmatter property.

tools.name: vault_properties
tools.description: List all frontmatter properties for a note.

tools.name: vault_query_properties
tools.description: Query notes by frontmatter property with optional path scope, fields projection, and limit.

tools.name: vault_search
tools.description: Full-text vault search with optional path scope and case-sensitive flag.

tools.name: vault_search_context
tools.description: Full-text vault search with matching context lines per result.

tools.name: vault_context_prepare
tools.description: DD-288 — assemble a VaultContextBundle for a work object, query, seeds, and optional scope.

tools.name: vault_context_expand
tools.description: DD-288 — expand a VaultContextBundle with bounded additional sources (scope frozen).

tools.name: vault_context_sources
tools.description: DD-288 — return the live source trail for a VaultContextBundle with drift detection.

tools.name: vault_section_read
tools.description: Read content under a specific heading in a note.

tools.name: vault_section_replace
tools.description: Replace content under a specific heading. Destructive within reversible-trash model.

tools.name: vault_tags
tools.description: List tags with usage counts, or return the hierarchical tag taxonomy.

tools.name: vault_tag
tools.description: List all files carrying a specific tag.

tools.name: vault_outline
tools.description: Get heading outline of a note with line numbers.

tools.name: vault_aliases
tools.description: List aliases declared in a note's frontmatter.

tools.name: vault_resolve_link
tools.description: Resolve a wikilink target to a vault-relative path with primary + candidates.

tools.name: vault_schema
tools.description: Return frontmatter schema for a note kind, or list all known kinds.

tools.name: vault_tasks
tools.description: List tasks (checkboxes) in the vault with optional file/path/status filters.

tools.name: vault_task_update
tools.description: Toggle / complete / uncomplete a task by reference.

tools.name: vault_bookmarks
tools.description: List bookmarks in the vault (files, folders, searches, URLs).

tools.name: vault_bookmark_add
tools.description: Add a bookmark (file, folder, search, or URL).

tools.name: vault_delete
tools.description: Delete a file (trash by default; permanent=true is irreversible).

tools.name: vault_rename
tools.description: Rename a file with automatic wikilink update.

tools.name: vault_move
tools.description: Move a file to a new folder with automatic wikilink update.

tools.name: vault_links
tools.description: List outbound wikilinks from a note (Lens index).

tools.name: vault_backlinks
tools.description: List inbound wikilinks to a note (Lens index).

tools.name: vault_orphans
tools.description: List orphan notes (no inbound links). Defaults to count-only.

tools.name: vault_deadends
tools.description: List dead-end notes (no outbound links). Defaults to count-only.

tools.name: vault_unresolved
tools.description: List unresolved (broken) wikilinks.

tools.name: vault_lens_status
tools.description: Lens index health: note/link counts, kind distribution, daemon heartbeat.

tools.name: vault_lens_remember
tools.description: DD-301 — record a durable memory with domains, importance, tier, and optional note_path link.

tools.name: vault_lens_recall
tools.description: DD-301 — recall memories with rich scope (domains, source, tier, importance) and structured _meta envelope (matched_total, returned, filtered_by).

tools.name: vault_lens_search
tools.description: Hybrid semantic + FTS search across the Lens index with scope filters.

tools.name: vault_lens_fts
tools.description: Pure FTS5 search across the Lens index with scope filters.

tools.name: vault_lens_related
tools.description: Related-notes lookup via Lens semantic embeddings.

tools.name: vault_lens_connections
tools.description: Hebbian connection lookup for a memory or note via the Lens graph.

tools.name: vault_lens_heat
tools.description: Lens heat-map analysis: recently accessed memories / hot domains.

tools.name: vault_lens_velocity
tools.description: Lens velocity analysis: growth rate of memories / domains over time.

tools.name: vault_lens_consolidate
tools.description: DD-301 — consolidate memories (decay, rehearsal, merge). Mutating maintenance.

tools.name: vault_lens_memory_stats
tools.description: Memory store statistics: total count, per-domain distribution, tier breakdown.

setup.help_text: No credentials required. Stallari Blade connects directly to your local Obsidian vault via the filesystem. Ensure the vault path is configured in Stallari settings.

test.skip_reason: Bundled library form factor (DD-265) — runs in-process inside the Stallari daemon; no credentials and no separate endpoint to probe.

setup.blurb: Obsidian vault operations via Swift MCP — read, write, search, properties, graph analysis, lens semantic tools

notes: Vault tools from stallari-blade (29 tools) + lens tools from stallari-lens (11 tools). Both map to the vault service via the vault-v1 contract. Library form factor (DD-265) — compiled into the Stallari daemon via SPM dep on stallari-vault; no separate install path. Vault is always-on so no consent_tile_link is set; marketplace renders a passive Bundled tile.
